text: In the first scene, I feel slightly disoriented, as if I am caught in a threshold space between function and formality—the sterile glass and bright lights contrast with the lurking presence of something unspoken. In the second scene, I am more reflective, drawn in by the philosophical tone of the wall text. I sense a gentle tension here, an awareness that I am both observer and observed, questioning my own participation in the unfolding act of observation. The atmosphere encourages introspection and a faint unease, as if deeper meaning lies just beneath the surface.
